name: coq10
description: Coenzyme Q10 is a lipid-soluble antioxidant nutrient that helps maintain product stability and provides health benefits.
raw_text: Cold Milled Flaxseed, Almonds, Brazil Nuts, Walnuts & CoQ10: 69% flaxseed, 10% almonds, 10% brazil nuts, 10% walnuts, waxy maize starch, co-enzyme Q-10. | Labels: en:vegetarian, en:no-gluten, en:source-of-fibre, en:vegan, en:no-added-sugar | Ultra CoQ10: Medium chain triglycerides (palm oil), polysorbate 80, gelatin, glycerin, sorbitol, purified water, hydroxylated soy lecithin and annatto suspension in sunflower oil | coq10: soybean oil, glycerin, lecithin
